title: Transitrix Studio Config Schema
description: Schema for .transitrixrc configuration file (legacy .cervinrc is read as a fallback through 1.x).

rules.title: Rule overrides
rules.description: Override validation rule severity levels. Errors cannot be downgraded.

^[A-Z]+-[0-9-]+$.description: Rule override value: 'off' to disable, 'warn' to report as warning
